"'''The Theft of Vader's Helmet'''" is a scenario for the [[Star Wars Miniatures]] game published in [[2004]]. It depicts an amusing, if improbable, scenario, in which a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] strike team manages to steal [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader's]] helmet from onboard the [[Executor/Legends|''Executor'']].
